rationale: In the citing paper, Ho, Lim, and Camerer (2006) appears only in a grouped introductory citation to prior marketing work that incorporates bounded rationality. The paper does not draw specific constructs, hypotheses, equations, measures, or empirical procedures from that article. The core model development and tests are instead grounded in other sources (e.g., contest theory, Fehr and Schmidt social preferences, and prospect-theory style reference dependence), so this reference functions as background positioning rather than a meaningful building block.
